html:
2026-0448
2026-05-20IRCCImmigration and Refugee Protection ActRegulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Electronic Travel Authorization) Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Electronic Travel Authorization) in order to add Indonesia and Malaysia to a list of countries and territories whose citizens are partially exempt from the temporary resident visa (TRV) requirement if they have held a Canadian TRV within the last 10 years or if they hold a valid United States non-immigrant visa at the time of their application.Registration: SOR/2026-0087 Publication Date: 2026-06-03
subject: Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Electronic Travel Authorization)
precis: Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Electronic Travel Authorization) in order to add Indonesia and Malaysia to a list of countries and territories whose citizens are partially exempt from the temporary resident visa (TRV) requirement if they have held a Canadian TRV within the last 10 years or if they hold a valid United States non-immigrant visa at the time of their application.
